sessions.title: Introduction
sessions.description: Sets the foundation for the course by walking students through the evolution of computers, hardware fundamentals, and the essential software tools they will be using.

sessions.title: Getting Started with Microsoft Word
sessions.description: Transitions from basic computer concepts to practical, hands-on skills, introducing students to word processing and document creation.

sessions.title: Page Layout and Paragraph Formatting
sessions.description: Builds on basic text skills by teaching students how to structure their documents professionally, focusing on overall page design and paragraph readability.

sessions.title: Clipboard, Styles, Headers, Footers and Page Elements
sessions.description: Introduces tools that help save time and give documents a polished, uniform structure.

sessions.title: Tables, Images, Shapes, Drop Cap and Linking
sessions.description: Focuses on visual elements and interactivity, teaching students how to organize information and make their documents visually appealing.

sessions.title: Final Word Assignment
sessions.description: A capstone project where students combine all their newly acquired skills to create a comprehensive Learning Journal.

sessions.title: Introduction to PowerPoint - Slides, Layouts, and Design Themes
sessions.description: Kicks off the presentation module by giving students a guided tour of the PowerPoint interface and teaching them how to build, format, and style their first slide deck from scratch.

sessions.title: Adding Images, Charts, SmartArt, and Tables
sessions.description: Focuses on replacing walls of text with engaging visual elements to make presentations easier to understand and more professional.

sessions.title: Transitions, Animations, and Presenting Slides
sessions.description: Brings presentations to life with movement and provides students with the tools they need to present confidently to an audience.

sessions.title: PowerPoint Mini Project
sessions.description: The capstone project for the PowerPoint module. Students combine all their formatting, visual, and animation skills into a final, polished presentation.

sessions.title: Smart CV Creation
sessions.description: Shifts the focus to career readiness, teaching students how to build a professional, ATS-friendly resume using modern tools.

sessions.title: Introduction to Excel
sessions.description: Introduces the world of spreadsheets, setting the foundational skills needed to organize, calculate, and analyze data.

sessions.title: Excel Formulas: SUM, AVERAGE, MIN, MAX
sessions.description: Moving beyond manual data entry, teaches students how to make Excel do the heavy lifting with automated mathematical calculations and logic.

sessions.title: Sorting, Tables and Referencing in Excel
sessions.description: Focuses on organizing large amounts of data efficiently and making formulas scalable and reusable.

sessions.title: Visualizing Data with Charts
sessions.description: Teaches students how to transform boring spreadsheets into clear, professional visual reports.

sessions.title: Advanced Data Retrieval
sessions.description: Dives into corporate-level Excel skills, teaching students how to instantly find data and build interactive dashboards.

sessions.title: Excel Capstone Project
sessions.description: The grand finale. Students step into the role of a Campus Data Analyst to solve a real-world administrative problem using everything they have learned.
